name: ASUS PRIME B850M-K AMD B850 mATX motherboard, AM5, PCIe 5.0 Ready, two M.2 slots, Realtek 2.5Gb Ethernet, DisplayPort, HDMI, rear USB 10Gbps Type-A, front USB 5Gbps Type-C, BIOS FlashBack, Aura Sync
shortName: ASUS PRIME B850M-K AMD B850 mATX motherboard, AM5, PCIe 5.0 Ready
description: ASUS PRIME B850M-K is a compact mATX motherboard for AM5 processors with PCIe 5.0 and DDR5 support.
